message:
test(filedescriptor): expand from 33 to 63 tests for file descriptors, pipes, sockets, and polling (wa-euxu9)

Add 30 new tests: all Error variant Display messages, pipe multiple writes/binary
data/EOF/fd distinction, socketpair large transfer/multiple messages/fd distinction,
FileDescriptor dup stderr/multiple try_clones/write debug, poll hangup detection/
zero timeout/simultaneous read+write events, StdioDescriptor variant distinctness/copy,
OwnedHandle dup from pipe, flush behavior, error from io::Error conversion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
